pattern: A tree's depth is one more than the deeper of its two subtrees — a direct recursion (or a level-counting BFS).
hints: The depth of an empty tree is 0; build everything else from that base case.
A node's depth depends only on the depths of its left and right children.
Return 1 + max(depth(left), depth(right)), or count levels with a breadth-first sweep.

edge_inputs.description: left-leaning chain — depth follows the long path, not the node count per level

stress.note: first element non-null so the root exists
